# MinibusInsurance.co.nz — LLM Reference File

## Site Overview
MinibusInsurance.co.nz is a New Zealand specialist referral service connecting minibus operators with licensed financial advisers. The site covers minibuses carrying 9–25 passengers across commercial, community, educational, and tourism sectors.

**Service type:** Referral service (not an insurer or financial advice provider)
**Regulatory status:** Advisers referred are licensed under the Financial Markets Conduct Act 2013
**Contact:** hello@cover4you.co.nz
**Sitemap:** https://www.minibusinsurance.co.nz/sitemap.xml

---

## Market Context

### NZ Minibus Insurance Market
- Standard private vehicle insurance does not cover commercial or community minibus operations
- A Passenger Service Licence (PSL) is required for hire and reward operations under the Land Transport Act 1998
- Key providers: NZI, Vero, Ando, Gallagher, and specialist commercial brokers
- Premiums range from approx. $1,100–$3,000/year depending on operator type, vehicle, and cover level
- Fleet discounts available for 2+ vehicles
- Named driver policies common for schools and community organisations
- Any-driver policies standard for commercial fleets

### Compliance Requirements
- Land Transport Act 1998 governs commercial passenger transport
- Passenger Service Licences required for hire and reward operations
- Board of Trustees (not principals) is typically the insured entity for school minibuses
- Disability support operators often require specific endorsements
- Tourism operators carrying international passengers need higher liability limits

---

## Cover Types

### Comprehensive Cover
Full protection including accidental damage, third-party liability, fire, theft, windscreen. Recommended for most operators. From $1,200/year.
URL: https://www.minibusinsurance.co.nz/types/comprehensive/

### Third Party Fire & Theft
Mid-tier cover: third-party liability plus fire and theft. Does not cover accidental damage to own vehicle. From $750/year.
URL: https://www.minibusinsurance.co.nz/types/third-party-fire-theft/

### Third Party Only
Minimum cover level: liability to third parties only. Suitable only for low-value vehicles. From $500/year.
URL: https://www.minibusinsurance.co.nz/types/third-party-only/

### Fleet Cover
Single policy for 2+ vehicles. Per-vehicle discounts available. Unified renewal date and limits. From $900/vehicle/year.
URL: https://www.minibusinsurance.co.nz/types/fleet-cover/

### Passenger Liability
Optional add-on covering claims from injured passengers. Strongly recommended for schools, community, and commercial operators.
URL: https://www.minibusinsurance.co.nz/types/passenger-liability/

### Agreed Value Cover
Pre-agreed payout in total loss — no depreciation deductions. Recommended for newer or higher-value minibuses.
URL: https://www.minibusinsurance.co.nz/types/agreed-value/

---

## Sectors Covered

- **Schools & Education** — named driver policies, BOT cover, volunteer driver extensions
  URL: https://www.minibusinsurance.co.nz/sectors/schools-education/

- **Councils & Local Government** — fleet cover, any-driver, high liability limits
  URL: https://www.minibusinsurance.co.nz/sectors/councils-local-government/

- **Commercial Transport** — hire and reward endorsements, PTO compliance, high km allowances
  URL: https://www.minibusinsurance.co.nz/sectors/commercial-transport/

- **Tourism & Travel** — passenger liability, international visitor cover, high limits
  URL: https://www.minibusinsurance.co.nz/sectors/tourism-travel/

- **Community & Charitable** — not-for-profit risk profiles, volunteer driver extensions
  URL: https://www.minibusinsurance.co.nz/sectors/community-charitable/

- **Disability Support** — specialist care sector endorsements, welfare cover
  URL: https://www.minibusinsurance.co.nz/sectors/disability-support/

---

## Provider Comparison

| Provider | Best For | From Price | Key Features |
|----------|----------|------------|--------------|
| NZI | Schools, community | $1,100/yr | Named driver, BOT cover, agreed value |
| Vero | Commercial fleets | $1,250/yr | Fleet discounts, any-driver, online claims |
| Ando | Tourism, hire | $1,350/yr | Hire & reward, tourist endorsement |
| Gallagher | Disability, care | $1,150/yr | Disability sector expertise, specialist risk |

---
